{"type": "chat", "analysis": "What's up! I'm locked and loaded with real-time market intelligence. Just scanned the latest buzz from X, StockTwits, Reddit, and the usual suspects. Seeing some interesting action in small-cap biotech (PLYX up 37% on Phase 2 trial progress), mega-cap takeover plays (MASI getting bought out by Danaher), and the usual suspects like TSLA dominating the AI/robotics narrative despite recent volatility.

What are you looking to trade or invest in? I can run specific scans, analyze individual tickers, or give you the full market briefing. The data's fresh and there are some solid asymmetric plays brewing in the sub-$500M space if you're feeling speculative, or we can stick to institutional-grade setups if you prefer lower risk.
